data User
  id: Int
  nickname: Option<String>
end

fn label(_ u: User) -> String
  match u.nickname
  when Some(name)
    "id=#{u.id},nick=#{name}"
  when None
    "id=#{u.id},nick=<anonymous>"
  end
end

let users = [
  User(id: 1, nickname: Some("alpha")),
  User(id: 2, nickname: None),
  User(id: 3, nickname: Some("gamma")),
]

for u in users
  println(label(u))
end
